name: esig-suite
description: Self-contained PDF e-signature SDK suite: @e-sig/core (engine + interfaces + signDocument), @e-sig/supabase (adapters), @e-sig/react (UI) + a Next.js starter.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @e-sig/core && npm run build -w @e-sig/supabase && npm run build -w @e-sig/react
scripts.clean: npm run clean -w @e-sig/core && npm run clean -w @e-sig/supabase && npm run clean -w @e-sig/react
scripts.test: npm run test -w @e-sig/core && npm run test -w @e-sig/supabase
